quarantine_reason: Unauthorized authority inversion promoted the perspective three-quarter render above the supplied orthographic construction dataset.
approval: Flamestrike approved all required changes and the pixel-perfect method to create the 3D asset

overrides.geometry_from_raster: authorized for projected visible geometry inside the locked numeric envelope

conflict_policy: flag_and_block_the_conflicting_datum; never average or silently reconcile
color_policy: source pixels are rendered-reference targets, not raw albedo
